title: Copper plus Backport
description: Adds vanilla copper armor and tools, also adds original copper extras.
body:
This mod adds:
- All copper tools
- Copper armor.
- Copper nuggets.
- Copper flintlock.
- Copper Bullets for copper flintlock.


Maybe in the future I will add more original tools and utilities to this mod :D, comment your cool ideas in comments or in my discord.
